---
title: "My GitHub Profile"
format: 
  gfm:
    fig-width: 7
    fig-height: 5
    variant: +gfm_auto_identifiers
editor: visual
---

# Hi, I'm Peiyuan 👋

## 🛠 技能栈

-   **编程语言**: `R` (tidyverse, ggplot2), `Python`, `SQL`
-   **数据处理**: 3D 建模 (Blender), 空间分析, 石器技术统计
-   **工具**: Git/GitHub, Quarto, Docker

## 📊 GitHub 统计

![Peiyuan's GitHub Stats](https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=PeiyuanXiao&show_icons=true&theme=radical)

![Top Langs](https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api/top-langs/?username=PeiyuanXiao&layout=compact&theme=radical)
